prompt:
Question: Which of the following passages is the original verbatim passage? The other passages are paraphrased versions of it.

Options:
A. The 18th installment of the professional wrestling pay-per-view (PPV) and livestreaming spectacle, known as Backlash, is the forthcoming 2023 edition, orchestrated by World Wrestling Entertainment (WWE). This event is specifically designed for athletes competing in the company's Raw and SmackDown brand divisions. The scheduled date for this thrilling occasion is Saturday, May 6, 2023, and it will unfold at the prestigious Coliseo de Puerto Rico José Miguel Agrelot, located in San Juan, Puerto Rico. Notably, this marks the first time a WWE event has been hosted in Puerto Rico since the New Year's Revolution in January 2005. Furthermore, it represents only the second Backlash event in history to be staged beyond the boundaries of the continental United States, following the 2004 iteration. While the preceding two years carried the title "WrestleMania Backlash," the 2023 event has reinstated its classic moniker, yet it continues to embrace its established post-WrestleMania theme. The core concept of the 2023 event revolves around the aftermath and repercussions stemming from WrestleMania 39. A prominent figure, native to Puerto Rico,
B. The 2023 Backlash is the upcoming 18th Backlash professional wrestling pay-per-view (PPV) and livestreaming event produced by WWE. It will be held for wrestlers from the promotion's Raw and SmackDown brand divisions. The event will take place on Saturday, May 6, 2023, at the Coliseo de Puerto Rico José Miguel Agrelot in San Juan, Puerto Rico. This will be the first WWE event held in Puerto Rico since New Year's Revolution in January 2005, and the second Backlash event ever held outside the continental United States since the 2004 event. After the previous two years were titled "WrestleMania Backlash", the 2023 event reverted to its original name while still maintaining its post-WrestleMania concept, with the 2023 event based around the backlash from WrestleMania 39. Puerto Rico native and
C. The 18th Backlash professional wrestling pay-per-view (PPV) and livestreaming event by WWE, the 2023 event will be held on Saturday, May 6, 2023, at the Coliseo de Puerto Rico José Miguel Agrelot in San Juan, Puerto Rico. It will be the first time WWE has held an event outside the continental United States since New Year's Revolution in January 2005.
